rationale: Both reviews catch the missing @[simp] on fiberHomeomorph_one. Review 2's unique finding—removing coe_eq_of_mem_stabilizer_fiber and mem_stabilizer_fiber_of_coe_eq as redundant .mp/.mpr projections—is clearly grounded in the diff and produces a genuinely cleaner API. Review 1's unique additions (the inverse lemma and simp on fiberHomeomorph_mul) cannot be confirmed from the diff and carry real risks of being wrong or harmful.
